analysis.previewButtonText: Preview Decision Steps — معاينة خطوات القرار

step1.text:
Preview Decision Steps / معاينة خطوات القرار
✕
◀
Step 1 / 7
▶
Phase / المرحلة: Initial posture — تمركز ابتدائي
Action / العمل
Establish the preview force posture around known bases and trial anchors.
Reason / السبب
The reviewed payload identifies bases, anchors, and proposed units before any committed tasking.
Risk / المخاطر
Baseline locations remain approximate until commander review confirms anchors.
Units involved / الوحدات المشاركة
RED F-14A Tomcat unknown x24RED F-4D/E Phantom II unknown x12RED F-5E Tiger II unknown x8RED F-5E Tiger II unknown x18RED C-130H Hercules unknown x6RED Boeing 707 Tanker unknown x2
Related bases/anchors / القواعد والمراسي المرتبطة
RED-BASE-HAMEDANRED-BASE-MEHRABADRED-BASE-BUSHEHRRED-BASE-BANDARABBASRED-BASE-CHABAHARRED-BASE-DEZFUL

mid.text:
Preview Decision Steps / معاينة خطوات القرار
✕
◀
Step 4 / 7
▶
Phase / المرحلة: Main movement/action — الحركة أو العمل الرئيسي
Action / العمل
Preview RED movement from related bases toward the objective or area of concern.
Reason / السبب
Current reviewed anchors are sufficient to show an approximate route for commander sense-making.
Risk / المخاطر
Routes are schematic and require terrain, doctrine, and operator review.
Units involved / الوحدات المشاركة
RED F-14A Tomcat unknown x24RED F-4D/E Phantom II unknown x12RED F-5E Tiger II unknown x8RED F-5E Tiger II unknown x18RED C-130H Hercules unknown x6RED Boeing 707 Tanker unknown x2

final.text:
Preview Decision Steps / معاينة خطوات القرار
✕
◀
Step 7 / 7
▶
Phase / المرحلة: Decision point — نقطة قرار
Action / العمل
Present the commander with a review point: continue, revise anchors, or request richer inputs.
Reason / السبب
The preview is based only on current Step 1/2 evidence and stops before committing scenario state.
Risk / المخاطر
Further action requires operator review and later-step evidence; no auto-apply path exists.
Units involved / الوحدات المشاركة
RED F-14A Tomcat unknown x24RED F-4D/E Phantom II unknown x12RED F-5E Tiger II unknown x8RED F-5E Tiger II unknown x18RED C-130H Hercules unknown x6RED Boeing 707 Tanker unknown x2
